user_prompt: ②进度阶段道具图标——珍珠贝：开口贝壳中一颗发光虹彩珍珠，深海宝藏调，珍珠白+金边贝壳。画风对齐海盗金币(参考图)，单个道具图标，透明/纯净底好抠图。

params.prompt_en: ONE SINGLE game item icon, do NOT generate multiple icons or a grid. An open seashell / oyster shell with a glowing iridescent PEARL resting inside, deep-sea treasure theme. Pearly white and soft iridescent rainbow sheen on the pearl, warm golden-rimmed shell, gentle inner glow, a few sparkle highlights. Rendered in the SAME art style as the reference image (the golden ship-wheel coin): glossy cartoon semi-painted game item icon, clean bold outline, vibrant saturated, soft rim light, centered single object, mobile game UI item icon. Plain neutral/transparent background for easy cutout, no text, no numbers, no UI frame, no characters.
params.note: progress item for board pickup mechanic; style-match the Monopoly coin item icon set; single icon, cutout-friendly bg.
